problem.title: Count the Number of Special Characters Ii

approaches.title: State Machine with Array Tracking
approaches.summary: Track character states (Unseen, LowerOnly, UpperAfterLower, UpperBeforeLower) using an array of enums to count special characters efficiently.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using u8 array with manual state transitions and counter adjustments.
Refactored to use a State enum for clarity, replacing manual state transitions with pattern matching and filtering the '
